title: Trump Says Iran Has Made a ‘Big’ Nuclear Promise. It Isn’t New.
summary_full: President Trump’s boasts of securing a commitment from Iranian leaders not to develop a nuclear weapon have puzzled nuclear experts who note that Tehran has made that pledge for more than 50 years.
summary_public: President Trump’s boasts of securing a commitment from Iranian leaders not to develop a nuclear weapon have puzzled nuclear experts who note that Tehran has made that pledge for more than 50 years.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump Says Iran Has Made a ‘Big’ Nuclear Promise. It Isn’t New.
